requirement_topic.en: Saudi Market Access — SABER Registration, PCoC/SCoC, In-Country Importer and Port Clearance
requirement_topic.zh: 沙特市场准入——SABER注册、PCoC/SCoC、本地进口商及港口清关
requirement_topic.zht: 沙特市場准入——SABER註冊、PCoC/SCoC、本地進口商及港口清關

summary.en: Non-Saudi manufacturers placing portable lithium batteries or power banks on the Saudi market must fulfil the following market access obligations: (1) SABER registration — the product is registered on the mandatory SABER platform operated under SASO. (2) Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) — a SASO-notified conformity assessment body issues a PCoC (valid one year) after reviewing test evidence against the applicable SASO technical regulation and SASO-adopted standards (SASO/IEC 62133 for safety). (3) Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) — for every consignment, a SCoC must be obtained on SABER before customs clearance at Saudi ports such as Jeddah (Jeddah Islamic Port) or Dammam (King Abdulaziz Port). (4) In-country importer — a Saudi-established importer of record must hold the SABER account and certificates and is the party answerable to SASO for market surveillance. (5) Labelling — Arabic-language marking, chemistry, rated capacity, and manufacturer/importer identification are required. There is no separate per-country EPR or WEEE registration of the EU type; the binding mechanism is SABER conformity plus the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 非沙特制造商将便携式锂电池或移动电源投放沙特市场，须履行以下市场准入义务：（1）SABER注册——产品在SASO下运营的强制性SABER平台注册。（2）产品符合证书（PCoC）——SASO认可的合格评定机构在审查依据适用SASO技术法规及SASO采纳标准（安全为SASO/IEC 62133）的测试证据后，签发有效期一年的PCoC。（3）装运符合证书（SCoC）——对每批货物，须在SABER上取得SCoC，方可在吉达（吉达伊斯兰港）或达曼（阿卜杜勒阿齐兹国王港）等沙特港口清关。（4）本地进口商——须由在沙特设立的登记进口商持有SABER账户及证书，并作为对SASO市场监督负责的一方。（5）标签——须有阿拉伯文标识、化学体系、额定容量及制造商/进口商标识。沙特没有欧盟式的单独按国EPR或WEEE注册；约束机制为SABER符合性加本地进口商。
summary.zht: 非沙特製造商將便攜式鋰電池或行動電源投放沙特市場，須履行以下市場准入義務：（1）SABER註冊——產品在SASO下運營的強制性SABER平台註冊。（2）產品符合證書（PCoC）——SASO認可的合格評定機構在審查依據適用SASO技術法規及SASO採納標準（安全為SASO/IEC 62133）的測試證據後，簽發有效期一年的PCoC。（3）裝運符合證書（SCoC）——對每批貨物，須在SABER上取得SCoC，方可在吉達（吉達伊斯蘭港）或達曼（阿卜杜勒阿齊茲國王港）等沙特港口清關。（4）本地進口商——須由在沙特設立的登記進口商持有SABER賬戶及證書，並作為對SASO市場監督負責的一方。（5）標籤——須有阿拉伯文標識、化學體系、額定容量及製造商/進口商標識。沙特沒有歐盟式的單獨按國EPR或WEEE註冊；約束機制為SABER符合性加本地進口商。

standards_or_laws: SABER platform — mandatory SASO conformity system (saber.sa) issuing Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC)
Applicable SASO technical regulation for batteries / electrical products
Saudi importer-of-record requirement — a Saudi-established importer must hold the SABER records
Saudi Customs / ZATCA clearance at ports including Jeddah Islamic Port and King Abdulaziz Port (Dammam) requires a valid SCoC

summary.en: China's domestic market access for lithium battery products uses a different framework: CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA/SAMR) is mandatory for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically (e.g., mobile phone lithium batteries are CCC-listed). However, CCC certification is a Chinese domestic market requirement and is NOT recognised by Saudi Arabia; it does not substitute for SABER registration, a PCoC, or a per-shipment SCoC. Chinese manufacturers do not need to appoint a Saudi importer of record for domestic Chinese sales. There is no Chinese equivalent of the SABER product-plus-shipment certification gateway or the in-country importer-of-record obligation for exporters.
summary.zh: 中国国内锂电池产品市场准入采用不同框架：CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理）对某些在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别为强制性（如手机锂电池已列入CCC目录）。然而，CCC认证属于中国国内市场要求，不被沙特认可，不可替代SABER注册、PCoC或逐批SCoC。中国制造商在国内销售时无需任命沙特登记进口商。对于出口商，中国没有等同于SABER产品加装运认证门户或本地登记进口商义务的对应制度。
summary.zht: 中國國內鋰電池產品市場准入採用不同框架：CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理）對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別為強制性（如手機鋰電池已列入CCC目錄）。然而，CCC認證屬於中國國內市場要求，不被沙特認可，不可替代SABER註冊、PCoC或逐批SCoC。中國製造商在國內銷售時無需任命沙特登記進口商。對於出口商，中國沒有等同於SABER產品加裝運認證門戶或本地登記進口商義務的對應制度。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in Saudi Arabia
PRC Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (2011, amended 2019) — domestic WEEE equivalent

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting portable batteries to Saudi Arabia face structural market access gaps with no Chinese domestic equivalent: (1) mandatory SABER registration of the product; (2) a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) from a SASO-notified body, valid one year, based on SASO-adopted-standard test evidence; (3) a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) for every consignment before port clearance at Jeddah or Dammam — an ongoing, per-shipment obligation; (4) a Saudi-established importer of record who holds the SABER account and answers to SASO; (5) Arabic-language labelling. CCC certification (Chinese domestic) is not transferable. Total compliance cost may include SASO-notified-body testing/certification fees, annual PCoC fees, per-shipment SCoC fees, and the cost of engaging a Saudi importer.
gap.zh: 向沙特出口便携式电池的中国制造商面临在中国国内无对应制度的结构性市场准入差距：（1）产品须在SABER强制注册；（2）须由SASO认可机构基于SASO采纳标准测试证据签发有效期一年的产品符合证书（PCoC）；（3）每批货物在吉达或达曼港口清关前须取得装运符合证书（SCoC）——属持续的逐批义务；（4）须有在沙特设立的登记进口商持有SABER账户并对SASO负责；（5）阿拉伯文标签。CCC认证（中国国内）不可转移。合规总成本可能包括SASO认可机构的测试/认证费、年度PCoC费、逐批SCoC费，以及聘用沙特进口商的成本。
gap.zht: 向沙特出口便攜式電池的中國製造商面臨在中國國內無對應制度的結構性市場准入差距：（1）產品須在SABER強制註冊；（2）須由SASO認可機構基於SASO採納標準測試證據簽發有效期一年的產品符合證書（PCoC）；（3）每批貨物在吉達或達曼港口清關前須取得裝運符合證書（SCoC）——屬持續的逐批義務；（4）須有在沙特設立的登記進口商持有SABER賬戶並對SASO負責；（5）阿拉伯文標籤。CCC認證（中國國內）不可轉移。合規總成本可能包括SASO認可機構的測試/認證費、年度PCoC費、逐批SCoC費，以及聘用沙特進口商的成本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SABER registration, a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) from a SASO-notified body, a per-shipment Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) before port clearance, a Saudi-established importer of record, and Arabic labelling apply before Saudi market placement
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of SABER registration, PCoC/SCoC, or a Saudi importer-of-record obligation required of Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese portable battery and power bank exporters must address Saudi market access through SABER: register the product, obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) from a SASO-notified body, and secure a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) for each consignment before clearance at ports such as Jeddah or Dammam — all held by a Saudi-established importer of record, with Arabic-language labelling. CCC certification does not transfer to or substitute for any of these Saudi requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国便携式电池及移动电源出口商须通过SABER应对沙特市场准入：注册产品、从SASO认可机构取得产品符合证书（PCoC），并对每批货物在吉达或达曼等港口清关前取得装运符合证书（SCoC）——全部由在沙特设立的登记进口商持有，并加贴阿拉伯文标签。CCC认证无法转移或替代上述任何沙特要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國便攜式電池及行動電源出口商須通過SABER應對沙特市場准入：註冊產品、從SASO認可機構取得產品符合證書（PCoC），並對每批貨物在吉達或達曼等港口清關前取得裝運符合證書（SCoC）——全部由在沙特設立的登記進口商持有，並加貼阿拉伯文標籤。CCC認證無法轉移或替代上述任何沙特要求。

source.publisher: SABER — Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO) conformity platform
